name: Gymnasium (Farama Foundation)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); Farama Foundation; successor to OpenAI Gym

performance.notes: Environment step speed depends on env; simple envs <1ms, complex 3D rendering envs 10-100ms

agent_readiness.notes: Standard RL environment interface — the universal API for reinforcement learning. Successor to OpenAI Gym (maintained by Farama Foundation). Env.step(action) → obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info. Classic control, Atari, MuJoCo, Box2D environments. Custom environment API. Used by virtually every RL library. pip install gymnasium[all] for environments. Compatible with Stable-Baselines3, RLlib, CleanRL, and all major RL frameworks.

gotchas: Not a training library — only defines environments (use SB3/RLlib for training)
Atari requires ROMs (legal in many regions)
Gymnasium 1.0 broke backwards compatibility with old OpenAI Gym
best_when: Standard RL environment interface for any RL training library
Building custom RL environments following standard API
Classic control, Atari, and physics-based RL benchmarks
Any reinforcement learning research or production system
avoid_when: When you need a training algorithm (pair with SB3/RLlib)
summary: Gymnasium is the standard RL environment interface — the Farama Foundation's maintained successor to OpenAI Gym. Universal env.step(action) → obs, reward, done API. Classic control, Atari, MuJoCo, and Box2D environments. Custom environment API. Compatible with all major RL training libraries (SB3, RLlib, CleanRL). The foundation layer of the Python RL ecosystem.
